display.purpose: Section heroes and landing headings. Used once per page.

headline.purpose: Page titles, card headers, and vocabulary word displays.

title.purpose: Section labels, group headings, and quiz question stems.

body.purpose: Explanations, cultural descriptions, quiz feedback. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: HSK tags, pinyin, stroke counts, timestamps, metadata. Monospaced for alignment.

shadows.name: interactive-hover
shadows.purpose: Applied on hover to interactive cards, buttons, and list items. Signals clickability.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Reserved for tooltips, autocomplete results, and context menus that float above the surface.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover transitions, card reveals, and exits. Responsive without bounce.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: State transitions: focus rings, border color changes, chip selection.

motion.name: card-flip
motion.purpose: Flashcard perspective flip. 380ms duration. Disabled when prefers-reduced-motion is set.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button. Ink Black at rest, Red Stamp on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #111111; color: #faf7f4; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-family: Geist, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #dc2626; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #dc2626; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #b91c1c; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Transparent with a warm border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #111111; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #c8bfb8; font-family: Geist, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 180ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f2ede8; border-color: #3d3835; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #dc2626; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: HSK Chip (Default)
components.description: HSK level filter tag. Monospaced for alignment in rows.
components.css: .ds-chip-hsk { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #f2ede8; color: #3d3835; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms, color 120ms; } .ds-chip-hsk:hover { background: #e4ddd6; color: #111111; }

components.name: HSK Chip (Active)
components.description: Selected HSK level filter. Red Stamp background.
components.css: .ds-chip-hsk-active { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #dc2626; color: #faf7f4; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input for search, quiz answers, and authentication.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #faf7f4; color: #111111; border: 1px solid #c8bfb8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: Geist, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; width: 100%; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, border-width 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b6055; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #111111; border-width: 1.5px; }

components.name: Vocabulary Card
components.description: Primary learning surface. Character large on front, decomposition on back.
components.css: .ds-vocab-card { background: #faf7f4; border: 1px solid #c8bfb8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px; position: relative; transition: box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-vocab-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(17, 17, 17, 0.08); } .ds-vocab-hsk { position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; background: #f2ede8; color: #3d3835; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-vocab-char { font-size: 4rem; line-height: 1; color: #111111; } .ds-vocab-pinyin { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #6b6055; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-vocab-meaning { font-family: Geist, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #3d3835; font-weight: 400; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: App shell tab navigation. Active state uses the only permitted Red Stamp border in the system.
components.html: VocabularyCultureQuizzes
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid #c8bfb8; background: #faf7f4; } .ds-nav-item { padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Geist, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; color: #6b6055; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; margin-bottom: -1px; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #111111; background: #f2ede8; } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #111111; border-bottom-color: #dc2626; }

narrative.overview:
A focused desk: clean paper, a single red stamp, characters written with deliberate care. Nothing competes with the work in front of you. The Moink design system is the desk, not the decoration.

Every surface is paper: warm white, slightly textured in feel if not in fact. Text is ink: high-contrast, intentional, unadorned. The red stamp appears once per surface, where it matters most, and then it is done. Motion is unhurried but not slow, like a brush drawn with purpose.

This system rejects the Duolingo gamification overload, the generic SaaS dashboard, the tourist-trap China aesthetic, and the academic/sterile tool. What remains is a tool that respects the learner's intelligence while remaining genuinely human.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper neutrals, high-contrast ink text, single red stamp accent used on at most 10% of any surface
Flat by default: surfaces separated by tint and border, never by shadow
Warm and tactile components: gently rounded, confident hover states with perceptible weight
Geist Sans for all UI text; Geist Mono for pinyin, labels, and phonetic notation
CJK character rendering via Hanzi Writer and a specified CJK font stack
One job per screen; no competing elements

rules.name: The Red Stamp Rule
rules.body: The red accent is permitted on one element per semantic region. If two elements on the same screen are both red, one of them is wrong. Rarity is the point.

rules.name: The No-White Rule
rules.body: Pure #ffffff is prohibited as any background or surface value. Paper Warm (#faf7f4) is the floor. Surfaces layer upward from there.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Geist handles all UI text. No decorative display face is introduced to add personality. Personality comes from content and culture, not from a script font overlay.

rules.name: The CJK Separation Rule
rules.body: Chinese characters are rendered by Hanzi Writer or a specified CJK font stack, never styled with Geist. The two type systems must not compete on the same text line.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No element casts a shadow at rest. Interactive elements may introduce a minimal ambient shadow on hover to signal elevation. Dropdowns and popovers use one defined shadow level only. Depth is earned by state, not by decoration.

dos: Do use Red Stamp (#dc2626) on at most one element per semantic region.
Do keep Paper Warm (#faf7f4) as the minimum background value. Never use pure #ffffff for any surface.
Do use Geist Mono for pinyin, stroke counts, HSK tags, and all phonetic notation.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on every Framer Motion animation and every Hanzi Writer stroke animation without exception.
Do let the Chinese character be the visual hero on learning screens.
Do use tint and 1px Brush Gray borders to separate surfaces. Shadow is for state only.
Do vary internal padding across card types. Uniform padding is monotony.
donts: Don't run gamification overload: competing badge animations, guilt-streak timers, or constant mascot presence.
Don't build generic SaaS UI: teal-white-rounded layouts, hero metric dashboards, identical card grids.
Don't use tourist-trap China aesthetics: red lanterns, dragon motifs, or overwrought cultural ornamentation.
Don't let the UI feel academic or sterile: no textbook-grey schemes, no dense unlabeled tables.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't use a modal as the first solution for flashcard reveals or quiz answers.
Don't introduce a second accent color to add energy.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or callouts.
